 • A physician assistant under the supervision of the certifying physician or under 
the supervision of an acute or post-acute care physician with privileges who cared

NPPs performing the encounter are subject to the same financial restrictions with the 
HHA as the certifying physician, as described in 42 CFR 424.22(d).
